title: crotalaria phylloloba
intro: Crotalaria phylloloba is a species of flowering plant in the family Fabaceae, commonly known as the pea or bean family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Crotalaria phylloloba include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit wound-healing properties. Crotalaria phylloloba can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, and is often used in traditional medicine in various regions of the world.
